message:
Fix slice/head/tail operators for new executor

- Fix slice parser to only pass arguments that were explicitly provided,
  instead of defaulting missing `end` to 0 (which broke open-ended slices)
- Add validation that stride must not be zero
- Add docs URLs to describe() for all three operators
- Remove unused operator_compiler_plugin inheritance from head/tail
- Clean up unused includes and remove debug validation code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
